messages.content: Hi, book an emergency appointment for a toothache as soon as possible.
I'm sorry to hear you're in pain. May I have your name, please? Also, do you have a preferred time for your emergency appointment today?
Mark Evans. ASAP. It hurts too much to wait.
Thank you, Mark. We will do our best to see you as soon as possible today for your emergency toothache. I'll check availability and get you scheduled shortly. Just a moment.
Just tell me when. I'm in a lot of pain.
Mark, we can see you today at 2:00 PM for your emergency appointment. Does that work for you?
Your emergency appointment is confirmed for today at 2:00 PM, Mark. Please arrive a few minutes early. We look forward to helping you. Take care!

score.reasoning: The assistant handled the urgent nature of the request with empathy and efficiency, though it failed to explicitly collect the patient's contact information.
